alturas.g: heights; a esas alturas = by that point

cantar.g: cantar la retirada = to admit defeat

cielo.g: pegar el grito al cielo = to protest loudly

dejaba.g: no lo dejaba = would not let up

derecha.g: pararse derecha = to stand up straight

difícil.g: hacerse la difícil = to play hard to get

equivoco.g: I'm wrong, I make a mistake

fuego.g: prueba de fuego = a trial by fire

habrá.g: could there be, will there be

llamo.g: I am called, my name is

nubes.g: en las nubes = walking on air

patas.g: meter las patas = to blunder badly

pecho.g: apretar el pecho = a tight ache in the chest

pedazos.g: a pedazos = in bits and pieces

perdido.g: lost; ya había perdido = had already lost

plena.g: en plena mesa = right in the middle of

poco.g: poco a poco = little by little

ritmo.g: agarrar el ritmo = to find the groove

salía.g: no salía = would not go out

soltarlo.g: to loosen it, let it go
